queries.question: Give me the assignments with the best 2 grades and the dates and times they were submitted.
queries.sql: SELECT date, time, submitted_time FROM Assignments JOIN Submissions ON Submissions.assignment_id =  Assignments.assignment_id  ORDER BY grade DESC LIMIT 2
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date ?time ?submitted_time WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?submissions a :Submissions .
  ?submissions p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?assignments p:date ?date .
  ?assignments p:time ?time .
  ?submissions p:submitted_time ?submitted_time .
  ?assignments p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 2

queries.question: Show me all assignment descriptions and corresponding dates and times.
queries.sql: SELECT date, time, description FROM Assignments ORDER BY date, time ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date ?time ?description WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?assignments p:date ?date .
  ?assignments p:time ?time .
  ?assignments p:description ?description .
  ?assignments p:date ?date_o .
  ?assignments p:time ?time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?date_o) ASC(?time_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: When were the assignments with the best 2 grades submitted and what was the timing for these assignments?
queries.sql: SELECT date, submitted_time FROM Assignments JOIN Submissions ON Submissions.assignment_id =  Assignments.assignment_id  ORDER BY grade DESC LIMIT 2
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date ?submitted_time WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?submissions a :Submissions .
  ?submissions p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?assignments p:date ?date .
  ?submissions p:submitted_time ?submitted_time .
  ?assignments p:grade ?grade_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?grade_o)
LIMIT 2
